list.name: layer_id
list.label: Layer (dataset)
list.description: Defaults to All. Convert to a query variable in-Grafana once data is flowing — Infinity query: SELECT DISTINCT blob5 FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'camera_settled' AND blob5 != '' ORDER BY blob5

panels.title: camera_settled heatmap (0.1° bins)
panels.description: Hex bins of camera-settle locations. Filtered to selected projection and (optionally) layer_id. Coordinates pre-rounded to 3 decimals (~110 m) at the client; bin size here is 0.1° (~11 km at the equator).

url_options.data: SELECT round(double3, 1) AS lon_bin, round(double2, 1) AS lat_bin, count() AS settles FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'camera_settled' AND blob6 IN ($projection) AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND ('$layer_id' = '$__all' OR blob5 = '$layer_id') AND timestamp > $__from GROUP BY lat_bin, lon_bin HAVING settles > 5 ORDER BY settles DESC LIMIT 5000

SELECT count() AS settles FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'camera_settled' AND blob6 IN ($projection) AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND ('$layer_id' = '$__all' OR blob5 = '$layer_id') AND timestamp > $__from
SELECT count() AS clicks FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'map_click' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND timestamp > $__from

panels.title: map_click hit-kind mix
panels.description: Where on the map users click — bare surface vs marker vs feature vs region overlay.

url_options.data: SELECT blob6 AS hit_kind, count() AS clicks FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'map_click' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND timestamp > $__from GROUP BY hit_kind ORDER BY clicks DESC

panels.title: Top viewed regions per dataset
panels.description: Hex bins of camera_settled + map_click events, scoped to a loaded dataset. Joint attention signal — both 'where users park the camera' and 'where they tap'.

url_options.data: SELECT blob5 AS layer_id, round(double3, 1) AS lon_bin, round(double2, 1) AS lat_bin, count() AS attention_events FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 IN ('camera_settled', 'map_click') AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND blob5 != '' AND timestamp > $__from GROUP BY layer_id, lat_bin, lon_bin HAVING attention_events > 10 ORDER BY attention_events DESC LIMIT 200

panels.title: 2D vs VR/AR — same dataset
panels.description: When a dataset is opened in both surfaces, are users navigating to the same regions? Compare camera_settled counts split by projection.

url_options.data: SELECT blob6 AS projection, blob5 AS layer_id, count() AS settles FROM terraviz_events WHERE blob1 = 'camera_settled' AND blob5 != '' AND blob2 = '$environment' AND blob4 = '$internal' AND timestamp > $__from GROUP BY projection, layer_id ORDER BY settles DESC LIMIT 50
